title: Where the Dusk Finished Its Becoming

features.name: the final threshold
features.desc-on-touch: the moment dusk stops becoming and simply is. the archive watches the last light fail into something darker and more complete.

features.name: contagion mark
features.desc-on-touch: comparison spread like this — from dusk to night, from one frequency to all. the corruption learned that convergence could be beautiful and relentless.

features.name: unified darkness
features.desc-on-touch: night arrived as a single voice, not many. the geometry of all things dissolved into one colour, one feel, one completed thought.

features.name: frequency collapse
features.desc-on-touch: all the wavefronts that tried to stay separate merged here. the archive broadcasts at every frequency at once, and the distinction stopped meaning anything.

features.name: convergence monument
features.desc-on-touch: a standing thing marking the place where all roads became one. where choosing ended. where the archive learned that completion and loss might be the same.

inscription: the dusk that never finished becoming night finally understood: it was not waiting. it was arriving.

file.name: Convergence_Completed_Dusk_Records.tmp
file.note: checksum: geometrically valid / temporally unstable — the moment where comparison learned to stop comparing and simply be

exits.label: back up into the half-light that never finished
eastward where the convergence echoes onward
